videos.title: Nordic Skiing: UVM Carnival - 15k/20k Skate (2/2/18)
videos.description: Alayna Sonnesyn led the Catamounts on Day 1 of the UVM Carnival winning the 15k Skate by a full minute. Check out all the highlights from a brisk day of racing at the Craftsbury Outdoor Center.

videos.title: Skijoring in Jackson Hole - Click in and Hang on for the Ride
videos.description: There is no better representation of the historic crossroad of cowboys and skiers in Jackson Hole than the sport of Skijoring. The race consists of an adrenaline packed 15-20 seconds where a skier gets pulled behind a horse, reaching speeds of up to 40 miles per hour while maneuvering various gates and obstacles.  One of the fastest sports on snow returned to Jackson Hole Mountain Resort in February and the action was hot!

videos.title: The Grand Traverse | A race Story from Crested Butte to Aspen
videos.description:
Lines aren’t easily drawn between the iconic, contrasting ski towns of Crested Butte and Aspen. But one thread has held strong: The Grand Traverse—a point-to-point ski race that links the towns through the Elk Mountains that sit between them.
 
Rounding on its 25th year in 2023, The Grand Traverse has been a premier ski mountaineering event in Colorado since its inception. Today, top competitors cover the 40-mile distance, climbing more than 6,800 feet along the way, within six hours. While fast times are the goal for some, 10 frostbite-less digits and reaching the finish line is the achievement for others.
 
Regardless of how it ends, competitors are left with a sense of accomplishment. In this short film, “The Grand Traverse,”directed by Mike Rogge and Verb Cabin, watch as 165 teams, with Aspen in their sights, endeavor to go the distance.

Presented by Montane 

@montaneofficial   

With additional support from Voile, Fly Low, C.A.M.P. USA, DirtBag Bar, Crested Butte Nordic and Backcountry Magazine

@voilemfg    @flylowgear    @BackcountryMagazine    @The Grand Traverse

videos.title: 10k Cross Country Race Snow Mountain Ranch
videos.description:
Hey! Thanks for watching! This is a  edited down video Snow Mountain Ranch 10k cross country ski race in Tabernash Colorado, pretty much Granby!

Thanks for everyone who helped put this race together and I highly recommend it for anyone next year!

Let me know if you have any questions about the race, skis, gear, conditions, etc. in the comments below. Also any feed back on the video would be great!

Sorry for the wind noise, its a first edition GoPro and the mic on the 360 cam is rough so I tried to hide it with loud songs.

videos.title: Jackson Hole Town Square Live Webcam Stream – See the Action Now 2026-03-11 15:32
videos.description:
Experience all the action from Jackson Hole Town Square with our live webcam stream! Broadcasting right from Yeah Buddy Pizza, this live cam gives you a front-row seat to downtown Jackson's famous elk antler arches and bustling activity on Broadway. Whether you're checking the weather or traffic, or just want to see what's happening in the heart of Jackson, you can count on our stream for the latest views.

Located at the iconic George Washington Memorial Park—known as the heartbeat of downtown—this webcam offers a unique perspective facing east across the square, including the southwest antler arch. There's also a separate camera view capturing the Cowboy Bar and arches along Cache Street, so you never miss a moment in this vibrant part of town.

SeeJH.ai

#JacksonHole #TownSquare #LiveWebcam #TrafficCam #Stream #SeeJH
tags: New Tags: Jackson Hole Town Square

videos.title: World Cup cross-country ski race canceled
videos.description:
A four-day skiing festival that would have brought athletes from around the world to Minneapolis has been canceled, with the organizers citing the health of the community as a reason. 

In a press release, John Munger, executive director of the Loppet Foundation said, "In keeping with updated information from the Minnesota Department of Health and after consulting with medical advisors, we are prioritizing the health and safety of our community, fans, athletes, staff and volunteers involved in these events."

https://www.kare11.com/article/news/health/coronavirus/fastenal-parallel-45-festival-and-world-cup-canceled-over-coronavirus-concerns/89-e3d833fb-15cb-4df8-b681-f82506364a09

videos.title: 2012 Junior Nationals - J1 Boys Sprint Final
videos.description: In the first final of the 2012 Junior Nationals, the J1 boys fought it out in the classical sprints A matchup.  Eli Hoenig played his cards well, moving forward in the final straightaway to take the title over New England teammate Patrick Cadwell, with double poling machine Cole Morgan collecting third.
